theme.es: Dios en la terapia y medicina

verse.es: "Honra al medico por los servicios que presta."
verse.en: "Honor physicians for their services, for the Lord created them; their gift of healing comes from the Most High."

es: Día 9. Honrar al médico, al terapeuta, al psicólogo es honrar las manos de Dios en la tierra. Rechazar la ayuda profesional no es fe. Es suerte. Fe es reconocer que Dios sana también a través de la sabiduría que transmite a sus criaturas.

Hay roca en el pecho que crees que es espiritual pero es más viejo: es orgullo. "No necesito terapeuta." "No necesito medicinas." "Dios es suficiente." Sí, Dios es suficiente. Y el camino que te da es precisamente el de la medicina y la ayuda.

La Escritura de hoy dice: "Honra al médico por los servicios que presta." Esto es literalmente orden. No sólo es permitido, es recomendado. Es el señor enseñando que usar lo disponible es sabiduría, no falta de fe.

Hoy reflexiona: ?de dónde viene mi resistencia a recibir ayuda profesional? ?Es realmente fe o es vergüenza disfrazada? La verdadera fe dice: Dios me cuida a través del terapeuta, de la medicina, de la ciencia que creó.
Tómate tiempo hoy para honrar y agendar con quien necesites. No es renunci a Cristo. Es permitir que Cristo te sane con las herramientas que puso a tu alcance.
en: Day 9. Honoring the doctor, the therapist, the psychologist is honoring God's hands on earth. Rejecting professional help is not faith. It is gambling. Faith is recognizing that God also heals through the wisdom He transmits to His creatures.

There is a stone in your chest that you believe is spiritual but is older: it is pride. "I do not need a therapist." "I do not need medicine." "God is enough." Yes, God is enough. And the path He gives you is precisely through medicine and help.

Today's Scripture says: "Honor physicians for their services, for the Lord created them." This is literally an order. It is not just permitted; it is recommended. It is the Lord teaching that using what is available is wisdom, not lack of faith.

Today reflect: Where does my resistance to professional help come from? Is it truly faith or is it shame disguised? Real faith says: God heals me through the therapist, through medicine, through the science He created.
Take time today to honor and schedule with whom you need. It is not renouncing Christ. It is allowing Christ to heal you with the tools He placed within your reach.

prayer.es: Jesus misericordioso, pongo en Tus manos mi salud fisica, mental y espiritual. Restaura lo que esta herido, fortalece lo que esta debil y guiame por caminos de vida plena. Dame sabiduria para cuidarme, humildad para pedir ayuda y esperanza para no rendirme. Amen.
prayer.en: Merciful Jesus, I place my physical, mental, and spiritual health in Your hands. Restore what is wounded, strengthen what is weak, and guide me on paths of abundant life. Give me wisdom to care for myself, humility to ask for help, and hope to keep going. Amen.

act.es: Hoy haz una accion concreta de cuidado integral: hidratarte mejor, caminar, descansar a tiempo, reducir pantalla, pedir acompanamiento o rezar diez minutos en silencio por tu sanacion.
act.en: Today do one concrete act of integral care: hydrate better, walk, rest on time, reduce screen time, ask for support, or pray ten minutes in silence for your healing.
